title: Late Submission and Asking the Teacher for Extension

all.en: Kevin knocked softly on the door of Ms. Adams's office after the last bell of the day.
all.zh: 凱文在當天最後一節鐘聲響後輕輕敲了亞當斯老師辦公室的門。

all.en: He had missed the deadline for his English literature essay by two whole days.
all.zh: 他的英國文學論文已經錯過截止日期整整兩天了。

all.en: Ms. Adams invited him to sit down and asked him to explain what had happened.
all.zh: 亞當斯老師請他坐下，並請他解釋發生了什麼事。

all.en: Kevin nervously admitted that his grandmother had been hospitalized over the weekend.
all.zh: 凱文緊張地承認他的祖母週末住院了。

all.en: He had been helping his family at the hospital and could not focus on writing.
all.zh: 他一直在醫院幫忙家人，無法專心寫作。

all.en: Ms. Adams listened patiently and expressed her sympathy for his difficult situation.
all.zh: 亞當斯老師耐心傾聽，對他困難的處境表達同情。

all.en: She agreed to grant him a three-day extension without lowering his final grade.
all.zh: 她同意給他三天的延期，並且不會降低他的最終成績。

all.en: However, she reminded him to communicate earlier next time if any problems occurred.
all.zh: 然而，她提醒他下次如果發生任何問題要更早溝通。

all.en: Kevin thanked her sincerely and promised to submit a high-quality essay on time.
all.zh: 凱文真誠地感謝她，並承諾會準時繳交一份高品質的論文。

all.en: He left the office feeling relieved and grateful for her kindness and understanding.
all.zh: 他離開辦公室時感到鬆了一口氣，並對她的善意和理解心存感激。

all.en: That night, he stayed up late polishing his essay, determined not to disappoint her.
all.zh: 那天晚上，他熬夜潤飾他的論文，決心不讓她失望。

all.en: The next morning, Kevin walked into class with the printed essay tucked under his arm.
all.zh: 隔天早上，凱文把列印好的論文夾在腋下走進教室。

all.en: He placed it gently on Ms. Adams's desk and thanked her once again for the chance.
all.zh: 他輕輕地把論文放在亞當斯老師的桌上，再次感謝她給予的機會。

all.en: Ms. Adams skimmed the first paragraph and gave him an approving nod from her chair.
all.zh: 亞當斯老師翻看了第一段，從椅子上對他點頭表示認可。

all.en: During lunch, Kevin called the hospital to check on his grandmother's recovery progress.
all.zh: 午餐時間，凱文打電話到醫院關心祖母的康復狀況。

all.en: The nurse cheerfully told him that she had eaten a full meal that morning.
all.zh: 護理師開心地告訴他，祖母早上吃了一整份餐點。

all.en: A week later, Ms. Adams returned the essay with a bright red A written on top.
all.zh: 一週後，亞當斯老師發回論文，上頭寫著一個鮮紅的 A 字。

all.en: She added a comment praising the depth of his analysis and the honesty of his voice.
all.zh: 她寫下評語，稱讚他分析的深度與聲音的真誠。

all.en: Kevin showed the grade to his mother, who hugged him tightly in the kitchen.
all.zh: 凱文把成績拿給母親看，她在廚房裡緊緊抱住了他。

all.en: From that day on, he started planning assignments at least one week ahead of time.
all.zh: 從那天起，他開始至少提前一週規劃每份作業。

all.en: He also wrote a thank-you card and slipped it into Ms. Adams's mailbox on Friday.
all.zh: 他還寫了一張感謝卡，週五悄悄塞進亞當斯老師的信箱裡。
